ddls:
CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information of the area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_codes" (
  "crime_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime code */,
  "crime_code" TEXT /* Code representing the type of crime */,
  "crime_description" TEXT /* Description of the crime */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Penalties associated with the crime */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Legal reference or statute related to the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapons" (
  "weapon_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the weapon used */,
  "weapon_description" TEXT /* Description of the weapon */,
  "weapon_category" TEXT /* Category of the weapon */,
  "legal_classification" TEXT /* Legal classification of the weapon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the incident */,
  "cross_street" TEXT /* Cross street nearest to the incident location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_districts" (
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reporting district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the reporting district */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "district_crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trend */,
  "crime_code" TEXT /* Code of the crime type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "total_incidents" INTEGER /* Total number of incidents reported for that crime code in the year */,
  "incident_category" TEXT /* Category of the incident */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area where the trend is observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_crime_code FOREIGN KEY ("crime_code") REFERENCES crime_codes ("crime_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit or department the officer belongs to */,
  "years_of_service" INTEGER /* Number of years of service */,
  "specializations" TEXT /* Specializations or training the officer has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrests" (
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrest */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident leading to the arrest */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Officer involved in the arrest */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date of the arrest */,
  "arrest_time" TEXT /* Time of the arrest */,
  "arrest_location" TEXT /* Location where the arrest was made */,
  "arrestee_info" TEXT /* Information about the arrestee */,
  "arrest_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the arrest */,
  "arrest_status" TEXT /* Status of the arrest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrests_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence" (
  "evidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of evidence */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident related to the evidence */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evidence */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence (e.g., physical, digital) */,
  "collected_date" TEXT /* Date when the evidence was collected */,
  "collector" TEXT /* Officer who collected the evidence */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the evidence is stored */,
  "chain_of_custody" TEXT /* Chain of custody for the evidence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each crime code
Code representing the type of crime
Legal reference or statute related to the crime
Unique identifier for the weapon used
Date when the status was last updated
Cross street nearest to the incident location
Unique identifier for the reporting district
Total number of incidents reported for that crime code in the year
ID of the area where the trend is observed
